ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture URL */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or about section */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is verified */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the post was last updated */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL to media (image, video) associated with the post */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been shared */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is pinned */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is private */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the post was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like entry */,
  "like" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is liked (1) or not (0) */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the post that is liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who liked the post */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the like was made */,
  "is_removed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the like has been removed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the post on which the comment is made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the comment was created */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_removed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been removed */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow relationship */,
  "followed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user being followed */,
  "date_followed" TEXT /* Date when the follow action took place */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the followed user's account is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id", "followed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the post that has a tag */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag associated with the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., like, comment) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the post associated with the notification (if applicable) */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the comment associated with the notification (if applicable) */,
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the like associated with the notification (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_like_id FOREIGN KEY ("like_id") REFERENCES likes ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user, content creator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., create_post, delete_comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_logs" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with this session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged into the platform */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged out of the platform */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the session (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
